projects.name: Macalla
projects.blocked_by: Post-viva slot (June 2026+); Iris not yet built
projects.next_action: Post-viva: create repo, set up training environment on Iris
projects.strategic_role: Personalized LLM pipeline — accumulates Todd's voice and reasoning via punctuated QLoRA; backbone for AfterWords/toddBot
projects.notes: Irish: echo/resonance (MAK-ul-uh). Base model: Qwen/Qwen3-8B-Instruct. Training machine: Iris (RTX 5080). Corpus: Mnemos weighted by recency + Aislinge salience. Training trigger: Léargas GMM drift detection. Dual-mode: thinking (AfterWords queries) / non-thinking (voice output). Versioned checkpoints: Todd-YYYY-MM. Novel contribution: GMM-annotated LoRA at solo-dev scale — potential paper post-viva. PRD v0.2 at foxxelabs-config/macalla/PRD.md.
